mapper.insert: insert into document_folders (folder_id, company_id, parent_folder_id, name, sort_order, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at) values (#{folderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentFolderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update document_folders set company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_folder_id = #{parentFolderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort_order = #{sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_by = #{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where folder_id = #{folderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select folder_id, company_id, parent_folder_id, name, sort_order, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at from document_folders where company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and upper(coalesce(trim(status), '')) = 'ACTIVE' order by parent_folder_id nulls first, sort_order asc, name asc
